summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Residential College app with 10 core modules, authentication, AI integration, and mobile responsiveness. Found 1 critical backend role-based access control issue.

critical_bugs.issue: Students can create events when they should be restricted (returns 200 instead of 403)
critical_bugs.impact: Breaks role-based access control - students have unauthorized event creation privileges
critical_bugs.expected_behavior: Only RA and Admin roles should be able to create events
critical_bugs.current_behavior: All authenticated users including students can create events

working_endpoints: /api/ai/suggest - Claude Sonnet 4 AI integration working perfectly

passed_tests: Landing page with 5 tabs (Overview, Core Features, Delight Features, How It Connects, App Prototype)
User registration with different roles (student, ra, admin)
Dashboard home module showing stats and upcoming events
Messages module - send and view messages
Events module - view events and RSVP functionality
Announcements module - view announcements (role-based access working)
Maintenance requests - submit and view requests
AI Assistant module - Claude Sonnet 4 integration working perfectly
Mobile responsive design - all modules work on mobile
Role-based access for announcements (students properly restricted)
RA/Admin users can create events and announcements
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix role-based access control for event creation: Add role check in /api/events POST endpoint to restrict event creation to only RA and Admin users (should return 403 for student role)
